name: ecommerce-detail-page-generator
description: Generate ecommerce product detail-page long images from a product reference image.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a product image into polished ecommerce detail-page image sets.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex workflow for generating 3-5 professional ecommerce detail-page long images from an uploaded product reference image, including product analysis, selling-point copy, prompt planning, visual QA, and demo-ready output packaging.
interface.defaultPrompt: 根据这张产品图，生成 5 套电商详情页长图。
